subcodes.first_line: O true friend! Complete contentment is attained from that exalted Being, for He is ever occupied with thoughts of strengthening the Cause of God and exalting the Word of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: دوست حقیقی کمال رضا از آنحضرت حاصل زیرا در فکر قوت امرالله و اعلاء کلمه الله
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @growth of the Cause, @entry by troops, @predictions and prophecies, @Hands of the Cause
